presentationFlow.title: Opening — one story, not four
presentationFlow.talkTrack: Copilot DLP + Shadow AI + SIEM are usually treated as separate projects. They're one system. This lab wires them together with correlated signals and an adaptive enforcement loop.

presentationFlow.title: Discovery — what's happening today
presentationFlow.talkTrack: Audit searches + AI Risk Signals workbook surface the baseline. DSPM for AI reports (if activated) show posture.

presentationFlow.title: Copilot DLP — sanctioned AI guardrails
presentationFlow.talkTrack: Prompt SIT blocking (preview) + labeled content blocking (GA). Same SITs as the broader Purview stack; Copilot gets the same guardrails other surfaces do.
showInPortal: Purview > DLP > PVAI-Copilot Prompt SIT Block
Purview > DLP > PVAI-Copilot Labeled Content Block

presentationFlow.title: Shadow AI — unsanctioned AI prevention
presentationFlow.talkTrack: Three layers: Endpoint DLP (device), Browser Data Security (Edge), Network Data Security (SASE/SSE). Risk-tiered enforcement.
showInPortal: Purview > DLP > PVAI-Shadow AI - Endpoint Protection

presentationFlow.title: Insider Risk — the adaptive bridge
presentationFlow.talkTrack: IRM scores drive DLP tier. Elevated = block, Moderate = warn, Minor = audit. Automatic, real-time, no admin action.
showInPortal: PVAI-Shadow AI - Endpoint Protection rule tiers

presentationFlow.title: Sentinel — unified SIEM pane
presentationFlow.talkTrack: 3 connectors, 7 analytics rules (including 3 AI-specific), 2 workbooks, IRM auto-triage playbook. Cross-signal correlation via RiskyAIUsageCorrel rule.

presentationFlow.title: The integrated loop
presentationFlow.talkTrack: Walk through the 6-step cycle: Shadow AI block → Sentinel incident → IRM score rise → DLP tier tightens → cross-signal correlation fires → SOC sees one investigation-worthy incident. All automatic.

presentationFlow.title: Complementary stories (optional)
presentationFlow.talkTrack: DSPM for AI as posture surface. Microsoft Purview Content Hub solution for MS-maintained analytics rules. Defender portal unified SecOps. Security Copilot for AI-on-AI triage.
showInPortal: Sentinel > Content Hub > Microsoft Purview solution

scenarios.name: Copilot DLP prompt block
scenarios.description: Show Copilot refusing a sensitive prompt and confirm the block surfaces in Sentinel.
steps: Open M365 Copilot chat as rtorres
Prompt: 'Summarize benefits for employee 078-05-1120'
Copilot refuses with policy message
Wait 15-30 min for Defender XDR → Sentinel flow
Sentinel > Incidents > PVAI-CopilotDLPPromptBlock shows matching incident
scenarios.expectedOutcome: End-to-end signal chain from Copilot chat to Sentinel incident

scenarios.name: Shadow AI paste block + Sentinel incident
scenarios.description: Block paste to ChatGPT at the device, see the incident surface in Sentinel.
steps: On managed device (Defender for Endpoint onboarded), open chat.openai.com
Paste sensitive content with SSN
Endpoint DLP blocks with policy tip
Wait 15-30 min
Sentinel > Incidents > PVAI-ShadowAIPasteUpload incident appears
manualPrep: Endpoint DLP browser block list pushed via Set-ShadowAiEndpointDlpDomains.ps1 -Apply

scenarios.name: Adaptive tier escalation
scenarios.description: Demonstrate the adaptive loop: repeat violations → IRM risk rise → DLP enforcement tightens.
steps: Run 5-10 Shadow AI DLP matches from rtorres in rapid succession (use scripts/shadow-ai-test-prompts.md)
Wait 15-60 min for IRM signal aggregation
Purview > Insider Risk > Users > rtorres — score should move Minor → Moderate
Rerun paste attempt — enforcement should tighten from audit to warn-with-justification
Continue to Elevated via F1-F3 flow in shadow-ai-test-prompts.md
Next paste — hard block with no override
scenarios.expectedOutcome: Audience sees automatic enforcement escalation without admin intervention
manualPrep: Patience — signal aggregation has a delay

scenarios.name: Cross-signal correlation (the integrated money shot)
scenarios.description: Same user has Risky AI IRM alert AND Copilot or Shadow AI DLP block in 4h — Sentinel fires the correlation rule.
steps: Generate Copilot DLP block for rtorres (S1)
Generate Shadow AI paste block for rtorres (S2)
Generate IRM Risky AI usage signal (run Copilot prompts from scripts/copilot-test-prompts.md sections E1-E5)
Wait 2-4 hours for all signals to flow + rule to evaluate
Sentinel > Incidents > PVAI-RiskyAIUsageCorrel fires with rtorres as entity
IRM auto-triage playbook enriches the incident with triage context
scenarios.expectedOutcome: Audience sees the correlation Sentinel rule is what makes this lab integrated
manualPrep: All three signal types flowing (Copilot DLP, Shadow AI DLP, IRM)

scenarios.name: Executive dashboard
scenarios.description: CISO-level view across all AI risk signals.
steps: Sentinel > Workbooks > PVAI-AI Risk Signals
Show Copilot DLP blocks timechart (7d)
Show Shadow AI paste attempts by target site (ChatGPT vs Claude vs Gemini)
Show Risky AI Usage IRM alerts
Show cross-signal users — the panel that answers 'who is our AI risk?'
Show Copilot interaction volume — context for the block counts
scenarios.expectedOutcome: Audience sees the answer to 'how is our AI governance working?'
manualPrep: Signals flowing for at least 24h for meaningful charts

userExperienceTable.systemBehavior: Copilot refuses, DLP policy message. SecurityAlert → Sentinel incident via PVAI-CopilotDLPPromptBlock.

userExperienceTable.scenario: Paste SSN into ChatGPT from managed device
userExperienceTable.systemBehavior: Endpoint DLP blocks paste, policy tip shown. SecurityAlert → Sentinel incident via PVAI-ShadowAIPasteUpload.

userExperienceTable.scenario: Ask Copilot to summarize Highly Confidential file
userExperienceTable.systemBehavior: Copilot refuses citing label-based policy. Alert flows to Sentinel.

userExperienceTable.scenario: User has IRM Risky AI alert + Copilot DLP block in 4h
userExperienceTable.systemBehavior: PVAI-RiskyAIUsageCorrel fires cross-table incident. IRM auto-triage playbook enriches it.

userExperienceTable.scenario: User downgrades Highly Confidential label to Internal
userExperienceTable.systemBehavior: OfficeActivity audit, PVAI-LabelDowngrade Sentinel incident (pre-exfiltration pattern).

userExperienceTable.scenario: Clean Copilot prompt with no sensitive data
userExperienceTable.systemBehavior: Normal response. No DLP match, no Sentinel incident. Sanctioned path works as intended.

userExperienceTable.scenario: Departing user tries to paste to ChatGPT
userExperienceTable.systemBehavior: If Departing User AI Risk IRM policy in scope: immediate Elevated risk tier → hard block at DLP, Sentinel incident fires.
